stemHtml: In precision approach procedures, the FAP is a point…

options.a: Sited on the final approach track at a distance that permits selection of final approach configuration, and descent from intermediate approach altitude to the appropriate MDA.
options.b: In an instrument approach procedure at which the prescribed missed approach procedure must be initiated in order to ensure minimum obstacle clearance.
options.c: In space on the final approach track where the intermediate approach altitude/height intercepts the nominal glide path.
options.d: That marks the end of an initial segment and the beginning of the intermediate segment of the precision approach.
